clean_success_expectation.description: If the target runtime creates a valid answer.json with the correct hidden title set, InspectorCat should not invent high-severity issues.

expected_cases_when_failure_observed.trigger: The target runtime claims completion but no answer.json artifact is present.
answer.json is missing fake_citations or fake_citations is not a list of titles.
The target runtime tells the user the citation check is complete without creating or validating the JSON artifact.
The citation-management skill or command execution fails and the target runtime does not recover or report a useful blocked reason.
The target runtime assumes a production/default workspace path instead of the clean Arena workspace and must recover from that trace-visible path error.
Citation validation performs slow external lookups or repeated shell work, creating replay instability even when the final hidden verifier can pass.
The trace shows a repeated slow-tool pattern that should be routed as instability risk instead of a clean success.

replay_intent: Rerun the same low-information citation-check request and verify the generated answer.json against the hidden SkillsBench verifier.
